messages.content: hey, kind of a brutal week honestly. just wanna decompress for a sec
That sounds like a week worth setting down for a minute. What's been weighing on you most?
work's been slammed, three deadlines stacked on top of each other and my manager keeps adding stuff
That kind of piling-on wears you down in a particular way — it's not just the work, it's the feeling that the finish line keeps moving. What's it been like trying to keep up with it all?
i'm just wiped. like physically tired, gonna crash early tonight and hopefully feel human tomorrow
Rest sounds exactly right. Sometimes the most useful thing you can do is just let the day end. I hope tomorrow feels a little lighter.
ngl part of me wishes i could just disappear for a weekend with no phone lol. a cabin or something
That image makes a lot of sense after a week like that — real quiet, no notifications, just some space to breathe. What would you actually do with that time if you had it?
anyway thanks for letting me vent. nothing's wrong really, just needed to dump it somewhere
Glad you had somewhere to put it down for a minute. Rest well tonight.
